title: Implement entry-file semantics for implicit main execution
goal: Make directly-run entry files execute non-import top-level statements as an implicit `main` while imported files remain definition-only.
context: Entry files may contain multiple executable statements.
Imported files may not contain arbitrary top-level executable statements.
Entry files should not define `class` or `module` directly.
steps: Update runner/checker to distinguish entry file mode from imported file mode.
Preserve current direct-run behavior while aligning the internal model with implicit main semantics.
Reject direct class/module definitions in entry files if the design requires it at this stage.
Add tests for entry files with imports and executable statements, plus imported-file restrictions.
done_when: Entry and imported files have distinct, documented top-level rules.
Existing CLI examples still run or are intentionally migrated.
